<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>AI Karyashala</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <style>
    :root {
      --accent-blue: #3b82f6;
      --accent-green: #10b981;
    }

    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box;
        font-family:"Segoe UI",-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif; }

    body { background:#0b1020; color:#fff; overflow-x:hidden; }

    /* ── Reveal ── */
    body.js .reveal, body.js .reveal-item {
      opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px);
      transition:opacity .4s ease,transform .4s ease;
      will-change:opacity,transform;
    }
    body.js .reveal.is-visible, body.js .reveal-item.is-visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){ .reveal,.reveal-item{ transition:none;transform:none;opacity:1; } }

    /* ── Header ── */
    .header { position:sticky; top:16px; z-index:1000; display:flex; justify-content:center; }
    .nav-shell {
      width:min(1100px,100% - 40px); padding:10px 24px; border-radius:999px;
      display:flex; gap:24px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
      box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(2,6,23,0.4),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      backdrop-filter:blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
    }
    .nav-brand { display:flex; align-items:center; }
    .nav-brand img { height:28px; }
    .nav-links { display:flex; gap:20px; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .nav-links a { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-decoration:none; padding-bottom:2px;
                   border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:color .25s,border-color .25s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color:#fff; border-color:var(--accent-blue); }
    .nav-hero-cta { font-size:13px !important; padding:9px 20px !important; }

    /* ── Hamburger ── */
    .hamburger {
      display:none; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; gap:5px;
      width:36px; height:36px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer;
      padding:4px; border-radius:8px; transition:background .2s;
    }
    .hamburger:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    .hamburger span {
      display:block; height:2px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.8); border-radius:2px;
      transition:transform .3s ease, opacity .3s ease, width .3s ease;
    }
    .hamburger span:nth-child(2) { width:75%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity:0; width:100%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

    /* ── Mobile nav drawer ── */
    .mobile-nav {
      display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999;
      flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:28px;
      background:rgba(11,16,32,.97); backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    }
    .mobile-nav.open { display:flex; }
    .mobile-nav a {
      color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); text-decoration:none;
      font-size:22px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.05em;
      transition:color .2s;
    }
    .mobile-nav a:hover { color:var(--accent-blue); }
    .mobile-nav .mob-close {
      position:absolute; top:24px; right:24px;
      background:none; border:none; color:#fff; font-size:28px; cursor:pointer; opacity:.7;
    }
    .mobile-nav .mob-close:hover { opacity:1; }

    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .hero-btn {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      padding:14px 32px; border-radius:12px; text-decoration:none;
      font-weight:700; font-size:16px;
      transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
    }
    .hero-btn--green { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#34d399); color:#fff;
                       box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(16,185,129,.4); }
    .hero-btn--green:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(16,185,129,.5); }

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero { position:relative; padding:110px 20px 80px; overflow:hidden; background:#0b1020; }
    .hero-orb {
      position:absolute; border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none; filter:blur(80px); opacity:.18;
      animation:orbFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .hero-orb--1 { width:500px; height:500px; background:#3b82f6; top:-120px; left:-100px; }
    .hero-orb--2 { width:400px; height:400px; background:#8b5cf6; top:40px; right:-80px; animation-delay:-3s; }
    .hero-orb--3 { width:300px; height:300px; background:#10b981; bottom:-60px; left:40%; animation-delay:-5s; }
    @keyframes orbFloat {
      0%,100% { transform:translate(0,0) scale(1); }
      33%      { transform:translate(20px,-20px) scale(1.05); }
      66%      { transform:translate(-15px,15px) scale(.97); }
    }
    .hero-shell { position:relative; z-index:1; max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }
    .hero-eyebrow { text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.25em;
                    font-size:13px; color:var(--accent-blue); margin-bottom:8px; }

    .new-batch-badge {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.2),rgba(16,185,129,.08));
      border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.5); border-radius:999px;
      padding:8px 20px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:#34d399;
      letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:24px;
    }
    .new-batch-badge .dot {
      width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#10b981;
      animation:pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(16,185,129,.4); }
      50%      { box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(16,185,129,0); }
    }
    .hero-copy h1 {
      font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,64px); line-height:1.1; margin:0 0 20px;
      font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.8px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,.85));
      -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent;
    }
    .hero-subtitle { font-size:18px; line-height:1.8; color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); max-width:620px; }
    .hero-actions { display:flex; gap:16px; margin:36px 0 0; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    /* ── Gallery ── */
    .gallery-section { padding:80px 20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
    .gallery-shell { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; }
    .section-header { text-align:center; }
    .section-header .hero-eyebrow { display:block; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .section-header h2 { font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px); font-weight:800; line-height:1.2; }
    .section-header p  { color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); margin-top:12px; font-size:16px; }
    .gallery-single {
      display:flex; justify-content:center; margin-top:48px;
    }
    .gallery-single img {
      width:100%; max-width:560px; aspect-ratio:3/2; object-fit:cover;
      border-radius:16px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      cursor:pointer; transition:transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
    }
    .gallery-single img:hover { transform:scale(1.03); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }

    /* ── Lightbox ── */
    .gallery-lightbox {
      position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9000; background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);
      display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column;
    }
    .gallery-lightbox.active { display:flex; }
    .gallery-lightbox img { max-width:90vw; max-height:80vh; border-radius:12px; object-fit:contain; }
    .lightbox-close {
      position:absolute; top:20px; right:24px; background:none; border:none;
      color:#fff; font-size:32px; cursor:pointer; opacity:.7; transition:opacity .2s;
    }
    .lightbox-close:hover { opacity:1; }

    /* ── Stat Banner ── */
    .stat-banner { padding:60px 20px; text-align:center; }
    .stat-banner-shell { display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
    .stat-main { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:6px; line-height:1; }
    .stat-num   { font-size:clamp(72px,12vw,120px); font-weight:900;
                  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#34d399);
                  -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent; }
    .stat-sep   { font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,80px); font-weight:300; color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); }
    .stat-denom { font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,80px); font-weight:900; color:rgba(255,255,255,.35); }
    .stat-label { font-size:clamp(15px,2vw,20px); color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);
                  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.2em; font-weight:600; }

    /* ── Batch Section ── */
    .batch-section { padding:80px 20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
    .batch-shell { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }
    .batch-title { font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,32px); font-weight:800; color:#fff;
                   margin-bottom:40px; text-align:center; }
    .batch-subtitle { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase;
                      letter-spacing:.15em; color:var(--accent-blue); margin:32px 0 16px; }
    .photo-grid {
      display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));
      gap:12px; list-style:none;
    }
    .photo-grid__item img {
      width:100%; aspect-ratio:1; object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      transition:transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease; cursor:pointer;
    }
    .photo-grid__item img:hover { transform:scale(1.05); box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }

    /* ── Vision ── */
    .vision { padding:80px 20px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto; text-align:center; }
    .vision h2 { font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,48px); font-weight:800; margin-bottom:28px; }
    .vision-quote {
      font-size:clamp(16px,2.2vw,22px); line-height:1.8; color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);
      font-style:italic; border-left:3px solid var(--accent-blue);
      padding-left:24px; text-align:left; margin-bottom:36px;
    }
    .vision-text p { font-size:clamp(15px,1.5vw,17px); line-height:1.8; color:rgba(255,255,255,.7); margin-bottom:16px; }

    /* ── Journey ── */
    @keyframes pinPop {
      0%   { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0); opacity:0; }
      65%  { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.18); opacity:1; }
      100% { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1); opacity:1; }
    }
    @keyframes pinRing {
      0%   { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1); opacity:0.7; }
      100% { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2.2); opacity:0; }
    }
    @keyframes pinFloat {
      0%,100% { transform:translateY(0); }
      50%      { transform:translateY(-9px); }
    }
    @keyframes routeFade { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }

    .journey { padding:90px 20px 80px; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; }
    .journey-header { text-align:center; margin-bottom:40px; }
    .journey-header h2 {
      font-size:44px; font-weight:800;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a78bfa,#60a5fa);
      -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent;
      margin:8px 0 12px; letter-spacing:-0.5px;
    }
    .journey-sub { font-size:16px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin:0; }
    .journey-map-wrap { position:relative; width:100%; aspect-ratio:900/900; }
    .journey-map {
      position:absolute; inset:0; border-radius:24px; overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 25% 30%,rgba(139,92,246,0.07) 0%,transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 75% 70%,rgba(59,130,246,0.07) 0%,transparent 70%),
        #080b1e;
    }
    .map-grid {
      position:absolute; inset:0;
      background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.022) 1px,transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.022) 1px,transparent 1px);
      background-size:48px 48px;
    }
    .map-svg { position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; animation:routeFade 1s ease 0.3s both; }
    .map-route { stroke-dashoffset:0; }
    .mpin { position:absolute; z-index:10; animation:pinFloat 3.2s ease-in-out infinite; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; }
    .mpin:hover { animation-play-state:paused; }
    .mpin-dot {
      position:absolute; top:0; left:0; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
      width:46px; height:46px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--c,#8b5cf6);
      border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:2;
      animation:pinPop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
      transition:transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1),border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .mpin-dot:hover { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.18); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
    .mpin-dot::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; border-radius:50%;
      background:var(--c,#8b5cf6); z-index:-1; animation:pinRing 2.4s ease-out infinite;
    }
    .mpin-emoji { font-size:20px; line-height:1; pointer-events:none; user-select:none; }
    .mpin-label {
      position:absolute; top:0; transform:translateY(-50%);
      background:rgba(8,10,30,0.92); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      border-radius:12px; padding:10px 14px; width:148px;
      backdrop-filter:blur(10px); transition:box-shadow .25s,border-color .25s;
    }
    .mpin:hover .mpin-label { border-color:var(--c,#8b5cf6); box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.45); }
    .mpin-label--right { left:calc(23px + 14px); border-left:3px solid var(--c,#8b5cf6); }
    .mpin-label--left  { right:calc(23px + 14px); text-align:right; border-right:3px solid var(--c,#8b5cf6); }
    .mpin-num { display:block; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--c,#8b5cf6); margin-bottom:3px; }
    .mpin-label strong { display:block; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .mpin-label p { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin:0; line-height:1.45; }
    .mpin:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay:0.7s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay:-0.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay:-1.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay:-2.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay:-0.3s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay:0.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(9)  { animation-delay:-1.1s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(10) { animation-delay:-1.9s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(11) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(12) { animation-delay:-0.5s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(3)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:0.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(4)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:1.0s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(5)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:1.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(6)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:1.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(7)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:2.2s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(8)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:2.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(9)  .mpin-dot { animation-delay:3.0s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(10) .mpin-dot { animation-delay:3.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(11) .mpin-dot { animation-delay:3.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(12) .mpin-dot { animation-delay:4.2s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(3)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:0.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(4)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:1.0s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(5)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:1.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(6)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:1.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(7)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:2.2s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(8)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:2.6s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(9)  .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:3.0s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(10) .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:3.4s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(11) .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:3.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(12) .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:4.2s; }

    /* ── Footer ── */
    .site-footer {
      position:relative; margin-top:120px; padding:60px 20px 40px;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,15,16,0.95),rgba(15,15,16,0.98));
      border-top:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.2);
    }
    .footer-content {
      max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;
      display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr)); gap:48px;
    }
    .footer-section { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; }
    .footer-section h3 {
      font-size:28px; font-weight:800;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#fb923c);

    .footer-social-link:hover { color:#fb923c !important; transform:translateX(4px); }
    .footer-links { list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; }

    .footer-links a:hover { color:#f59e0b; transform:translateX(4px); }
    .footer-divider { max-width:1100px; margin:40px auto 0; height:1px;
                      background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(245,158,11,0.3),transparent); }
    .footer-credit { max-width:1100px; margin:30px auto 0; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size:13px; text-align:center; }

    /* jump to top */
    .jump-to-top {
      position:fixed; bottom:32px; right:32px; width:44px; height:44px;
      border-radius:50%; background:rgba(59,130,246,.2); border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.4);
      color:#fff; font-size:18px; cursor:pointer; opacity:0; pointer-events:none;
      transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s; z-index:900;
    }
    .jump-to-top.visible { opacity:1; pointer-events:auto; }
    .jump-to-top:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); background:rgba(59,130,246,.4); }

      /* Vision */
      .vision { padding:56px 16px; }
      .vision-quote { padding-left:16px; }

      /* Journey */
      .journey { padding:56px 16px; }
      .journey-header { margin-bottom:28px; }
      .journey-header h2 { font-size:26px; }
      .journey-map-wrap { aspect-ratio:auto; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; margin-top:28px; }
      .journey-map { display:none; }
      .mpin {
        position:static; animation:none;
        display:flex; flex-direction:row; align-items:center; gap:14px;
        background:rgba(12,14,35,0.9); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
        border-left:3px solid var(--c,#8b5cf6);
        border-radius:14px; padding:14px 16px;
        text-decoration:none; color:inherit;
      }

      .mpin-dot::after { display:none; }

      .mpin-label { position:static; transform:none; width:auto; flex:1;
                    background:none; border:none !important; border-radius:0;

      .mpin-label--left { text-align:left; right:auto; }

      /* Footer */

    }

    }
  </style>

<script>
  document.body.classList.add('js');
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-item');
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries, o) => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('is-visible'); o.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -8% 0px' });
    revealTargets.forEach(t => obs.observe(t));
  } else {
    revealTargets.forEach(t => t.classList.add('is-visible'));
  }

  const hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
  if (hero) {
    let ticking = false;
    const check = () => { document.body.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > hero.offsetHeight * 0.35); ticking = false; };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(check); ticking = true; } }, { passive: true });
    check();
  }

  const jumpBtn = document.querySelector('.jump-to-top');
  if (jumpBtn) {
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => jumpBtn.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 300), { passive: true });
    jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));
  }

  const lightbox = document.querySelector('.gallery-lightbox');
  const lbImg    = lightbox?.querySelector('img');
  document.getElementById('galleryPhoto')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lbImg.src = document.getElementById('galleryPhoto').src;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });
  lightbox?.querySelector('.lightbox-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  });
  lightbox?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) { lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox?.classList.contains('active')) {
      lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  });

  window.addEventListener('load', () => { if (!window.location.hash) window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'auto' }); });

  // Mobile nav
  const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
  const mobileNav    = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  const mobileClose  = document.getElementById('mobileNavClose');
  const openMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };
  const closeMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };
  hamburgerBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMobileNav);
  mobileClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);
  mobileNav?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav));
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMobileNav(); });
</script>

</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>

    }

    /* ── Header ── */
    .header { position:sticky; top:16px; z-index:1000; display:flex; justify-content:center; }

      display:flex; gap:24px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;

    .nav-links { display:flex; gap:20px; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .nav-links a { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-decoration:none; padding-bottom:2px;
                   border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:color .25s,border-color .25s; }

    .nav-hero-cta { font-size:13px !important; padding:9px 20px !important; }

    /* ── Hamburger ── */
    .hamburger {
      display:none; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; gap:5px;
      width:36px; height:36px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer;
      padding:4px; border-radius:8px; transition:background .2s;
    }
    .hamburger:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    .hamburger span {
      display:block; height:2px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.8); border-radius:2px;
      transition:transform .3s ease, opacity .3s ease, width .3s ease;

    .hamburger span:nth-child(2) { width:75%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity:0; width:100%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

    /* ── Mobile nav drawer ── */
    .mobile-nav {
      display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999;

    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .hero-btn {

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero { position:relative; padding:110px 20px 80px; overflow:hidden; background:#0b1020; }

    @keyframes orbFloat {

    .hero-shell { position:relative; z-index:1; max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }
    .hero-eyebrow { text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.25em;
                    font-size:13px; color:var(--accent-blue); margin-bottom:8px; }

    }
    .hero-copy h1 {
      font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,64px); line-height:1.1; margin:0 0 20px;
      font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.8px;

    /* ── Gallery ── */
    .gallery-section { padding:80px 20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
    .gallery-shell { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; }
    .section-header { text-align:center; }
    .section-header .hero-eyebrow { display:block; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .section-header h2 { font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px); font-weight:800; line-height:1.2; }
    .section-header p  { color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); margin-top:12px; font-size:16px; }
    .gallery-single {
      display:flex; justify-content:center; margin-top:48px;
    }
    .gallery-single img {
      width:100%; max-width:560px; aspect-ratio:3/2; object-fit:cover;

    }
    .gallery-single img:hover { transform:scale(1.03); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }

    /* ── Lightbox ── */
    .gallery-lightbox {
      position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9000; background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);

      position:absolute; top:20px; right:24px; background:none; border:none;
      color:#fff; font-size:32px; cursor:pointer; opacity:.7; transition:opacity .2s;
    }
    .lightbox-close:hover { opacity:1; }

    /* ── Stat Banner ── */
    .stat-banner { padding:60px 20px; text-align:center; }

<script>
  document.body.classList.add('js');
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-item');
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries, o) => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('is-visible'); o.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -8% 0px' });
    revealTargets.forEach(t => obs.observe(t));
  } else {
    revealTargets.forEach(t => t.classList.add('is-visible'));
  }

  const hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
  if (hero) {
    let ticking = false;
    const check = () => { document.body.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > hero.offsetHeight * 0.35); ticking = false; };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(check); ticking = true; } }, { passive: true });
    check();
  }

  const jumpBtn = document.querySelector('.jump-to-top');
  if (jumpBtn) {
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => jumpBtn.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 300), { passive: true });
    jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));
  }

  const lightbox = document.querySelector('.gallery-lightbox');
  const lbImg    = lightbox?.querySelector('img');
  document.getElementById('galleryPhoto')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lbImg.src = document.getElementById('galleryPhoto').src;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });
  lightbox?.querySelector('.lightbox-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  });
  lightbox?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) { lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox?.classList.contains('active')) {
      lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  });

  window.addEventListener('load', () => { if (!window.location.hash) window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'auto' }); });

  // Mobile nav
  const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
  const mobileNav    = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  const mobileClose  = document.getElementById('mobileNavClose');
  const openMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };
  const closeMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };
  hamburgerBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMobileNav);
  mobileClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);
  mobileNav?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav));
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMobileNav(); });
</script>

  <button class="jump-to-top" aria-label="Jump to top" title="Back to top">↑</button>
</footer>

<script>
  document.body.classList.add('js');
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-item');
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries, o) => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('is-visible'); o.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -8% 0px' });
    revealTargets.forEach(t => obs.observe(t));
  } else {
    revealTargets.forEach(t => t.classList.add('is-visible'));
  }

  const hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
  if (hero) {
    let ticking = false;
    const check = () => { document.body.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > hero.offsetHeight * 0.35); ticking = false; };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(check); ticking = true; } }, { passive: true });
    check();
  }

  const jumpBtn = document.querySelector('.jump-to-top');
  if (jumpBtn) {
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => jumpBtn.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 300), { passive: true });
    jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));
  }

  const lightbox = document.querySelector('.gallery-lightbox');
  const lbImg    = lightbox?.querySelector('img');
  document.getElementById('galleryPhoto')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lbImg.src = document.getElementById('galleryPhoto').src;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });
  lightbox?.querySelector('.lightbox-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  });
  lightbox?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) { lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox?.classList.contains('active')) {
      lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  });

  window.addEventListener('load', () => { if (!window.location.hash) window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'auto' }); });

  // Mobile nav
  const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
  const mobileNav    = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  const mobileClose  = document.getElementById('mobileNavClose');
  const openMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };
  const closeMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };
  hamburgerBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMobileNav);
  mobileClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);
  mobileNav?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav));
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMobileNav(); });
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>AI Karyashala</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <style>
    :root {
      --accent-blue: #3b82f6;
      --accent-green: #10b981;
    }

    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box;
        font-family:"Segoe UI",-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif; }

    body { background:#0b1020; color:#fff; overflow-x:hidden; }

    /* ── Reveal ── */
    body.js .reveal, body.js .reveal-item {
      opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px);
      transition:opacity .4s ease,transform .4s ease;
      will-change:opacity,transform;
    }
    body.js .reveal.is-visible, body.js .reveal-item.is-visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){ .reveal,.reveal-item{ transition:none;transform:none;opacity:1; } }

    /* ── Header ── */
    .header { position:sticky; top:16px; z-index:1000; display:flex; justify-content:center; }
    .nav-shell {
      width:min(1100px,100% - 40px); padding:10px 24px; border-radius:999px;
      display:flex; gap:24px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
      box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(2,6,23,0.4),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      backdrop-filter:blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
    }
    .nav-brand { display:flex; align-items:center; }
    .nav-brand img { height:28px; }
    .nav-links { display:flex; gap:20px; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .nav-links a { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-decoration:none; padding-bottom:2px;
                   border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:color .25s,border-color .25s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color:#fff; border-color:var(--accent-blue); }
    .nav-hero-cta { font-size:13px !important; padding:9px 20px !important; }

    /* ── Hamburger ── */
    .hamburger {
      display:none; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; gap:5px;
      width:36px; height:36px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer;
      padding:4px; border-radius:8px; transition:background .2s;
    }
    .hamburger:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    .hamburger span {
      display:block; height:2px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.8); border-radius:2px;
      transition:transform .3s ease, opacity .3s ease, width .3s ease;
    }
    .hamburger span:nth-child(2) { width:75%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity:0; width:100%; }
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

    /* ── Mobile nav drawer ── */
    .mobile-nav {
      display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999;
      flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:28px;
      background:rgba(11,16,32,.97); backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    }
    .mobile-nav.open { display:flex; }
    .mobile-nav a {
      color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); text-decoration:none;
      font-size:22px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.05em;
      transition:color .2s;
    }
    .mobile-nav a:hover { color:var(--accent-blue); }
    .mobile-nav .mob-close {
      position:absolute; top:24px; right:24px;
      background:none; border:none; color:#fff; font-size:28px; cursor:pointer; opacity:.7;
    }
    .mobile-nav .mob-close:hover { opacity:1; }

    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .hero-btn {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      padding:14px 32px; border-radius:12px; text-decoration:none;
      font-weight:700; font-size:16px;
      transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
    }
    .hero-btn--green { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#34d399); color:#fff;
                       box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(16,185,129,.4); }
    .hero-btn--green:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(16,185,129,.5); }

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero { position:relative; padding:110px 20px 80px; overflow:hidden; background:#0b1020; }
    .hero-orb {
      position:absolute; border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none; filter:blur(80px); opacity:.18;
      animation:orbFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .hero-orb--1 { width:500px; height:500px; background:#3b82f6; top:-120px; left:-100px; }
    .hero-orb--2 { width:400px; height:400px; background:#8b5cf6; top:40px; right:-80px; animation-delay:-3s; }
    .hero-orb--3 { width:300px; height:300px; background:#10b981; bottom:-60px; left:40%; animation-delay:-5s; }
    @keyframes orbFloat {
      0%,100% { transform:translate(0,0) scale(1); }
      33%      { transform:translate(20px,-20px) scale(1.05); }
      66%      { transform:translate(-15px,15px) scale(.97); }
    }
    .hero-shell { position:relative; z-index:1; max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }
    .hero-eyebrow { text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.25em;
                    font-size:13px; color:var(--accent-blue); margin-bottom:8px; }

    .new-batch-badge {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.2),rgba(16,185,129,.08));
      border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.5); border-radius:999px;
      padding:8px 20px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:#34d399;
      letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:24px;
    }
    .new-batch-badge .dot {
      width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#10b981;
      animation:pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(16,185,129,.4); }
      50%      { box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(16,185,129,0); }
    }
    .hero-copy h1 {
      font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,64px); line-height:1.1; margin:0 0 20px;
      font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.8px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,.85));
      -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent;
    }
    .hero-subtitle { font-size:18px; line-height:1.8; color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); max-width:620px; }
    .hero-actions { display:flex; gap:16px; margin:36px 0 0; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    /* ── Gallery ── */
    .gallery-section { padding:80px 20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
    .gallery-shell { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; }
    .section-header { text-align:center; }
    .section-header .hero-eyebrow { display:block; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .section-header h2 { font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px); font-weight:800; line-height:1.2; }
    .section-header p  { color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); margin-top:12px; font-size:16px; }
    .gallery-single {
      display:flex; justify-content:center; margin-top:48px;
    }
    .gallery-single img {
      width:100%; max-width:560px; aspect-ratio:3/2; object-fit:cover;
      border-radius:16px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      cursor:pointer; transition:transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
    }
    .gallery-single img:hover { transform:scale(1.03); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }

    /* ── Lightbox ── */
    .gallery-lightbox {
      position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9000; background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);
      display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column;
    }
    .gallery-lightbox.active { display:flex; }
    .gallery-lightbox img { max-width:90vw; max-height:80vh; border-radius:12px; object-fit:contain; }
    .lightbox-close {
      position:absolute; top:20px; right:24px; background:none; border:none;
      color:#fff; font-size:32px; cursor:pointer; opacity:.7; transition:opacity .2s;
    }
    .lightbox-close:hover { opacity:1; }

    /* ── Stat Banner ── */
    .stat-banner { padding:60px 20px; text-align:center; }
    .stat-banner-shell { display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
    .stat-main { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:6px; line-height:1; }
    .stat-num   { font-size:clamp(72px,12vw,120px); font-weight:900;
                  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#34d399);
                  -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent; }
    .stat-sep   { font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,80px); font-weight:300; color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); }
    .stat-denom { font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,80px); font-weight:900; color:rgba(255,255,255,.35); }
    .stat-label { font-size:clamp(15px,2vw,20px); color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);
                  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.2em; font-weight:600; }

    /* ── Batch Section ── */
    .batch-section { padding:80px 20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
    .batch-shell { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }

                   margin-bottom:40px; text-align:center; }
    .batch-subtitle { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase;
                      letter-spacing:.15em; color:var(--accent-blue); margin:32px 0 16px; }
    .photo-grid {
      display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));

    }
    .photo-grid__item img {
      width:100%; aspect-ratio:1; object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px;

    }
    .photo-grid__item img:hover { transform:scale(1.05); box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }

    /* ── Vision ── */
    .vision { padding:80px 20px; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto; text-align:center; }
    .vision h2 { font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,48px); font-weight:800; margin-bottom:28px; }
    .vision-quote {
      font-size:clamp(16px,2.2vw,22px); line-height:1.8; color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);

    /* ── Journey ── */
    @keyframes pinPop {

    }
    .journey-map {
      position:absolute; inset:0; border-radius:24px; overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);

    .map-grid {

    .map-svg { position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; animation:routeFade 1s ease 0.3s both; }

    .mpin { position:absolute; z-index:10; animation:pinFloat 3.2s ease-in-out infinite; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; }

    .mpin-dot:hover { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.18); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
    .mpin-dot::after {

    .mpin-emoji { font-size:20px; line-height:1; pointer-events:none; user-select:none; }

    .mpin-label--left  { right:calc(23px + 14px); text-align:right; border-right:3px solid var(--c,#8b5cf6); }
    .mpin-num { display:block; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--c,#8b5cf6); margin-bottom:3px; }
    .mpin-label strong { display:block; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .mpin-label p { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin:0; line-height:1.45; }
    .mpin:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay:0.7s; }

    .mpin:nth-child(11) .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:3.8s; }
    .mpin:nth-child(12) .mpin-dot::after { animation-delay:4.2s; }

    /* ── Footer ── */
    .site-footer {

    .footer-section { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; }

      letter-spacing:-0.5px;

<script>
  document.body.classList.add('js');
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-item');
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries, o) => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('is-visible'); o.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -8% 0px' });
    revealTargets.forEach(t => obs.observe(t));
  } else {
    revealTargets.forEach(t => t.classList.add('is-visible'));
  }

  const hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
  if (hero) {
    let ticking = false;
    const check = () => { document.body.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > hero.offsetHeight * 0.35); ticking = false; };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(check); ticking = true; } }, { passive: true });
    check();
  }

  const jumpBtn = document.querySelector('.jump-to-top');
  if (jumpBtn) {
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => jumpBtn.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 300), { passive: true });
    jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));
  }

  const lightbox = document.querySelector('.gallery-lightbox');
  const lbImg    = lightbox?.querySelector('img');
  document.getElementById('galleryPhoto')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lbImg.src = document.getElementById('galleryPhoto').src;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });
  lightbox?.querySelector('.lightbox-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    lightbox.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  });
  lightbox?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) { lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && lightbox?.classList.contains('active')) {
      lightbox.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  });

  window.addEventListener('load', () => { if (!window.location.hash) window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'auto' }); });

  // Mobile nav
  const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
  const mobileNav    = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  const mobileClose  = document.getElementById('mobileNavClose');
  const openMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.add('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  };
  const closeMobileNav = () => {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.classList.remove('open');
    hamburgerBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };
  hamburgerBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMobileNav);
  mobileClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);
  mobileNav?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav));
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMobileNav(); });
</script>
</body>
</html>
